items.text:
*BOOKS OPEN*

Hope everyone has a Brilliant Easter 💛

Our books are open for those ages 6-15 years and 45+ for performers interested in Film & TV, Stage & Musicals, Modeling & Commercials based anywhere in the UK & Ireland. And also Americans of all ages based in London for a specific project currently casting. 

We will be reviewing applications over the Easter Holiday. 

Parents must apply on behalf of their child.

The Application Form can be found here - https://aurumtalentagency.com/RepresentationForm

Thank you ✨
items.previewDescription: UK Based talent agency representing exceptional talent from age 3+ Both Young Performers and Adult Talent.

Get ready to rock 🎸
Don’t miss the electrifying performance of School of Rock by students from Andrew Lloyd Webber’s incredible program!

Catch the energy, talent, and pure passion live on stage at Storyhouse Theatre 🎭

📅 Coming soon, bring your friends, spread the word, and support these rising stars!

#SchoolOfRock #LiveTheatre #SupportYoungTalent #Storyhouse
items.previewDescription: Get ready to turn up the volume and feel the power of rock like never before! Inspired by the hit movie School of Rock, this electrifying stage musical is packed with high-energy performances, unforgettable songs, and a whole lot of attitude.

items.text:
*“Acting Up!” – Valley Theatre’s Free guided acting program for Adults -  next sessions*
A big thanks for the great turn out for our Improv evening last Monday. We’re having a week off for bank holiday but then back on Monday April 13th for our new topic: *Monologues* . Fun to do and great for auditions! 
As per the Ethos of the course, participants will be guided towards a performance  - this time a short - or shortish - scripted monologue for our  *Monologue-athon!* later in the month.
All welcome. *Ps writers!* Have you a short monologue you’d like to submit for our students’ consideration and for our upcoming scratch night?  Submission on Word to info@valleytheatre.co.uk with *“Monologues”* in the subject box.
- The Valley team

"Calling all pageant enthusiasts…

Unleashed the beauty within You!  

Are you ready to step into the spotlight and own the runway?

Introducing the Invitational Pasarela Training  
with a FREE Assessment!

Discover the art of walking with grace…
Master your runway techniques…
Build unstoppable poise and confidence…
And perfect your pageant walk skills.
This is your moment…
to shine, to stand out…
and to walk like a queen.

Join us and unlock the beauty, power, and elegance within you.
For more information,
look for Ms. Joycie at 0992-884-0931
or visit the Facebook page:
Laguna’s Talent Learning Center – LTA.

✨ Your journey to the crown begins here. ✨

items.text:
# 🎬 **CASTING UPDATE – AUDITION TIME CHANGE**

Please note that the audition time for **“Two in One” (Working Title)** has been updated:

# 📍 **New Time: ** **2:00 PM – 6:00 PM**

📅 April 12

📌 Unity Spiritual Center of Wilmington (**Library Room**)

All other details remain unchanged.

We look forward to seeing you there.

----------------------------------------------------------------

**🎬 CASTING CALL – FEMALE LEAD (WILMINGTON, NC)**

**Non-Union Short Film | April Shoot**

Looking to cast **1 Female Lead (30–35, any ethnicity)** for a character-driven short film with a unique creative approach.

**🎭 THE ROLE – “MAX”**
Confident, grounded, and emotionally layered. This role explores duality through subtle performance and presence.

👉 **This is a strong reel opportunity** — the performance will be used to create **two different interpretations of the same story**, showcasing range and nuance.

**📍 AUDITIONS**
April 12 | 1:00 PM – 4:00 PM
Unity Spiritual Center of Wilmington
717 Orchard Ave, Wilmington, NC

**AUDITION SPOTS STILL AVAILABLE**

**🎥 SHOOT DATES**
April 18 (Primary)
April 19 (Backup)

**🎬 NOTES**
* Non-union
* No nudity
* Must be comfortable wearing a short black slip
* New actors welcome

**💰 COMPENSATION**
* $15 gas stipend
* Meals provided
* Reel footage

**📩 TO SUBMIT**
Email: Stage13Auditions@gmail.com
Include:
* Photo (headshot or full body)
* Reel (if available, not required)

 

Spots still available

topComments.text: 🔔 Update: Audition time is now 2:00–6:00 PM (Library Room). Still booking slots 👇

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję odtwórców do następujacych ról:

1. Igi (18) – Od początku historii martwy. Pogubiony, romantyczny nastolatek z MOW-u. Rola BEZ TEKSTU

Data: 17 kwietnia + kontynuacja 
- 1 dzień pomiędzy 27.04 - 01.05
Stawka: 600 zł netto za całość

2. Grzegorz Krawczyk (30) – diler, zostaje zamordowany, niewyróżniające się ubranie w stylu sportowym, cwaniak. 

Data: 15. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Klient (28) – klient dilera, dresy, czapka z daszkiem, nie wygląda na narkomana, tylko „rekreacyjnie” zażywającego, zestresowany. 

Data: 15. kwietnia
Stawka: 300 zł netto

4. Siwy, Mateusz Siwek (44) – boss narkotykowy, bezwzględny, wzbudza respekt, mściwy, ceni lojalność, ale potrafi kalkulować. Może być napakowany, łysy.

Data: 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

5. Gangster 1 (34) – człowiek Siwego, jego prawa ręka, uzbrojony, wygadany, 

Data: 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 500 zł netto

6.Porywacz 1 (30) – zbir i kryminalista.

Data: 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7.Jaworski (26) – kryminalista, który poszedł na współpracę z prokuraturą. Typ drobnego cwaniaczka. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 13. i 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

8.Gangus (37) – napakowany zbir z szajki narkotykowej. 

Data: 13. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

Szanowni Państwo  ...

Na wtorkowy / 7. 04 / plan krótkiej formy komercyjnej realizowanej na potrzeby kanału 
TIK TOK, 

Szukamy:  EPIZODYSTOW 

- kobiet I mężczyzn

- z doświadczeniem w pracy przed kamerą 

- polskojęzycznych 

- pogodnych 

- uśmiechniętych

Wtorek,  7 kwietnia 
Godz przedpołudniowe
Stawka: 250.00 PLN netto płatne po planie 

Zainteresowane I dyspozycyjne osoby,  które chciałyby spędzić z nami chwil parę we wtorkowe przedpołudnie, 

Bardzo proszę o wysłanie zgłoszenia 
w wiadomości prywatnej mail, 

Na adres:  abcastingab@gmail.com 

📭📭📭📭📭📭📭📭📭📭📭📭📭

items.text:
URGENT CASTING CALL - “I Remember Forgetting” - One Day Filming - Lincoln

Young Wayne (7-16 y/o)
Female (30s-50s)
Male (30s-50s) 

Hello everyone 👋🏻 Please Direct Message me with headshots and any videos of your acting experience if you’re interested. We want to film asap with our SONY FX30 cine-cameras and have a great time on set—like we have done throughout 😄 Expenses will be covered. 

We’re hoping to make “I Remember Forgetting” film-festival-worthy and it is a story that consoles men-and-women suffering from loss/mental-illnesses. This story is relevant to me personally and it would mean a lot to hear from you. Thank you for reading.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING CALL FOR SHORT FILM I REMEMBER FORGETTING A PSYCHOLOGICAL DRAMA EXPLORING GRIEF, TRAUMA, AND FRAGMENTED MEMORY ROLES YOUNG WAYNE Male, Age: 7-16 Seriously observing volatile argument between parents Silent, emotionally reactive. LAURA- WAYNE'S MOTHER Female, Age: 30s-50s Emotional, protective mother in tense argument with Mark. Struggling to control household chaos. MARK WAYNE'S FATHER Male, Age: 30s-50s Volatile, confrontational father arguing with Laura. Intense, emotional confrontation. FILMING IN LINCOLN, UK ONE DAY SHOOTING EXPENSES COVERED STUDENT GRADUATION FILM TO APPLY, EMAIL: masoncumminsmate@gmail.com Send headshot & acting experience. Subject line: Remember Forgetting Casting'

items.text:
PAID CASTING CALL: Entertainers
£30-£500*

Weekends

PLEASE ONLY APPLY IF YOU MATCH THE ETHNICITY DESCRIPTORS! 

Have you been declined work because of your disabilities or differences? 

Then we would love for you to join our team! 

Casting call:

Diverse Entertainers and show hosts,

With strong ability to impersonate celebrities, characters and host and present events.

Well disciplined in at least 2 of the below: 

Singing 

Dance 

Acting 

Accents 

Improv 

Mascot animation

Ability to work well in a diverse team with varying disabilities and conditions. 

We are a company who specialise in providing events for families with disabilities and hardships as clients and as cast members. 

Perks:

Access to a free vocal coach 

Access to a free choreographer 

Access to a free impersonation coach 

Access to resources in wig wearing, makeup, costuming and theatrical disciplines.

The chance to pitch, write and star in your own shows if relevant to our ethos. 

This role would suit people who have experience in holiday parks, theme parks and immersive events but we are happy to take on those with less experience on the understanding they must go through our 8 week training program.

Playing  age: 16-30

Ethnicity: East Asian decent, west Asian decent, black, mixed race, traveller and gypsy. 

Location: London, Kent, Milton Keynes, Portsmouth and surrounding areas. 

Transport and refreshments are covered and there is also a chance to earn more as a designated driver for various events so long as you have a clean driving license and have had your license for 3 years minimum.

We are looking for confident, outgoing performers who can take direction well and impersonate well loved characters, learn our scripts, songs, dance routines and party plans and entertain large crowds of families at immersive events. 

If you believe you fit this description, please email: 

- CV

-Headshot 

-Showreel / monologue and song

Email:  princessacademyinfo@gmail.com

Or whatsapp:

07432425329

Pay *

(including but not limited to)

30 minutes £30

45 minutes £50

1 hour £80

1.5 hour £100 

2 hour £110

2.5 hours £150 

Half day £200

Full day £300 

Specialist events £500

Event styles:

Festivals 

Fairs 

Private parties

Theatre shows 

Clubs

Pubs

Community events

Hospital events 

Library events 

School events 

Fundraisers

Shows we are casting for:

Kpop superstars 

Princess Academy 

Fairy magic 

Superhero school 

DinoSAW

items.text:
Amazing opportunity for UK women, hope it's ok to share here!

CASTING CALL: Garnier Hair Campaign ✨

Women with gorgeous hair needed! 

We’re looking to connect with UK based millenial women (aged 30–45) who are loyal Garnier Olia users (10+ years).

For this project, we’re specifically looking for someone with long, glossy hair (ideally dark/brunette) and a natural confidence on camera.

This shoot will take place in Prague (mid-April, dates TBC), 

Fee: £8000 + expenses, shoot fees and travel fees.

If this sounds like you — or you know someone who fits the bill — tag your friend with the beautiful hair below

 To apply, please send:

– Your name, age and location

– A recent photo

– A note on your experience using Garnier Olia

Email: casting@casperblackcasting.com

**CASTING CALL – UK DRAMA SERIES (LONDON) - MAY 2026**

We’re casting for a gritty London-based drama series shooting in May 2026.  Looking for strong, natural actors for a range of roles including:

* Lead roles
* Supporting roles
* Featured speaking parts
* Main supporting roles (urgent)

This is a character-driven drama with a raw, grounded tone — focused on real people under pressure.

* North-West London based shoot

To apply:

Send your headshot, CV & showreel (if available)

Include your name, age, location & availability

 [darkzonefilms@gmail.com](mailto:darkzonefilms@gmail.com)

Serious applicants only.

— Dark Zone Films

items.text:
Urgent Casting Call 🚨
We're looking for creative and passionate actors to be part of an upcoming short film production! The Eden Project is a cinematic mystery/drama with themes of identity, transformation and a mysterious force. 

You could be just starting out and looking to build your portfolio or an experienced actor wanting to be apart of something meaningful and timely. Either way you are welcome!

Do note, if you really resonate with any of the roles but you don't fit the race stated, still apply, we'd love to meet you!

If you're interested in any of the roles, head over to this link and kindly fill in the form to apply! 

docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc1wDjk3cuoEQYc5oCSeVmeGGrcoYZq7SA40ea29fmRb1Ngtg/viewform?usp=header

Any questions, just shoot an email or DM.

info.eden500@gmail.com

items.summary:
Urgent Casting Call 🚨
We're looking for creative and passionate actors to be part of an upcoming short film production! The Eden Project is a cinematic mystery/drama with themes of identity, transformation and a mysterious force. 

You could be just starting out and looking to build your portfolio or an experienced actor wanting to be apart of something meaningful and timely. Either way you are welcome!

Do note, if you really resonate with any of the roles but you don't fit the race stated, still apply, we'd love to meet you!

If you're interested in any of the roles, head over to this link and kindly fill in the form to apply! 

docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc1wDjk3cuoEQYc5oCSeVmeGGrcoYZq7SA40ea29fmRb1Ngtg/viewform?usp=header

Any questions, just shoot an email or DM.

info.eden500@gmail.com
items.title: Urgent Casting Call 🚨

items.text:
URGENT – FANCY BEING IN A FILM? 

We’re a group of students filming a short film in Worcester and are looking for a few locals to help out as pub regulars.

We’re shooting in a real pub and want it to feel as natural and lively as possible, so we’re hoping to involve real local people.

No acting experience needed at all, it’s very relaxed. You’ll simply be part of the scenes, chatting, reacting, and helping bring the atmosphere to life.

🍽️ Free refreshments provided

📍 Worcester (pub location)
📅 Dates: 7th, 8th, 13th, 14th April
⏰ Times:
• 7th & 8th: 5pm – 10pm
• 13th: 11am – 9pm
• 14th: 5pm – 10pm

Any help would be hugely appreciated, even just spreading the word to family and friends.

If you are interested or looking for more detail, please don't hesitate to get in touch:
s4403762@glos.ac.uk or text 07954656167

items.title: URGENT – FANCY BEING IN A FILM?

items.text:
🎬URGENT – FANCY BEING IN A FILM? 

We’re students from the University of Gloucestershire and we are shooting a short film in a Worcester pub THIS WEEK and looking for a few extras to join us as pub regulars. 

We’re shooting in a real pub and want it to feel as natural and lively as possible, so we’re hoping to involve real local people.

The film is ‘Pints of Patriotism’, set in London in 1943, based around the rivalry between British locals and American soldiers. Below the surface it is also about finding a sense of belonging, overcoming insecurity, and the importance of friendship in the face of war.

No acting experience needed at all, it’s very relaxed. You’ll simply be part of the scenes, chatting, reacting, and helping bring the atmosphere to life.

🍽️ Free refreshments provided

📍 Worcester (pub location)
📅 Dates: 7th, 8th, 13th, 14th April
⏰ Times:
* 7th & 8th: 5pm – 10pm
* 13th: 11am – 9pm
* 14th: 5pm – 10pm

Any help would be hugely appreciated, even just spreading the word to family and friends. We’d love to have you involved! 🍻🎞️

If you are interested or looking for more details, please don't hesitate to get in touch:
s4403762@glos.ac.uk or text 07954656167

items.title: Join me for private or group classes in:

items.text:
WHAT: Saturday 9th May, 2–5pm – Devising a Story
This workshop is for actors who want to create work from the ground up — trusting their instincts, imagination, and collaboration to bring something original to life.

Across the session, we’ll work practically to:
• Generate and develop characters, relationships, and ideas from scratch
• Shape spontaneous ideas into clear, playable stories
• Explore structure, stakes, and dramatic tension in devised work
• Collaborate as an ensemble to build something cohesive and performable
• Let go of overplanning and trust what emerges in the moment

You can arrive with a spark — a character, an idea, a line — or with nothing at all. We’ll build from whatever is in the room.

The focus is on freedom, creativity, and discovery — creating work that feels alive, surprising, and truly your own.

WHEN: Saturday 9th May 2026, 2–5pm

WHERE: The Crescent Theatre, Birmingham

PAYMENT: £38
Places are limited.

Email estherstanford@icloud.com or message to book.

#theworkshopactorsstudio #birminghamactingclass #actingclass #devising

items.text:
Coucou tout le monde ☀️

Pour compléter notre magnifique week-end de 3 jours dansants qui se déroulera du 23 au 25 mai Marseille en Fête ☀️BINKISS☀️SOPHIE☀️MAKITI☀️  nous avons le plaisir de vous convier à la représentation du BALLET de BINKISS SANGARÉ, le dimanche 24 mai à 21h au Cabaret Théâtre de l’Étoile Bleue à Marseille !

💛 À travers ce spectacle, "DONDOUGOU", le chorégraphe, exprime en même temps la difficulté d'être un artiste, la relation à Soi, aux autres, et sa réussite en tant que danseur 💛

Un énorme merci aux danseuses et aux musiciens qui soutiennent ce projet depuis le début 🙏

☀️On se retrouve DIMANCHE 24 MAI☀️

Ouverture des portes à 21h
Début du spectacle 21h30

🌟 ENTRÉE 8€ 🌟

💫ADRESSE 💫
Cabaret Théâtre l’Étoile Bleue
107 bis Bld Jeanne d’Arc 13005 Marseille

Les PLACES sont LIMITÉES 🙏☀️

N'hésitez pas à nous contacter pour toute information complémentaire.

INSCRIPTIONS :

ame.dambe.asso@gmail.com
06 74 99 96 34 (via whatsapp)
06 69 00 18 64

🐣🌸 Frohe Ostern von den FMM Studios München! 🌸🐣  

Wir wünschen all unseren Kunden – und allen, die es noch werden möchten – entspannte Feiertage, kreative Inspiration und ganz viel gute Musik! 🎶✨  

Die FMM Studios München stehen für professionelle:  
🎧 Musikproduktion  
🎚️ Mixing & Mastering  
🎬 Postproduktion (Film & Audio)  

Und für alle, die selbst durchstarten wollen:  
🎹 Coaching & Kurse – online oder 1:1 direkt bei uns im Studio  

Egal ob du deinen nächsten Song produzieren willst, deinen Mix auf ein neues Level bringen möchtest oder in die Welt der Audioproduktion eintauchen willst – wir sind für dich da.  

👉 Mehr Infos: www.fmm-studios.de  

Genießt die Feiertage und bleibt kreativ! 🐰🎶  
Euer FMM Studios Team

**Stefanie Rummel live auf dem Jahreskongress des Bundes Deutscher Gesangspädagogen!** 🎤✨ 

Am **11.04. | 10–11 Uhr**: Mein Vortrag zu **Gesangsstilen & Forschung** – mit spannenden **2D- und 3D-MRT-Studien**! 

Entdecke anatomische Veränderungen beim Singen und Sprechen verschiedener Stile. 
Ein Muss für Gesangsexpert:innen! 💫

items.text:
Emily Stephens is doing a virtual table read for my feature film script "Judy OR The Tale of the Bitch's Chair" on Sunday, April 12th from 2-5pm and she is in need of actors to read the roles. She will be seeking feedback for the script so there will be time at the end of the table read for feedback to be given by the actors. Table read is not a guarantee of casting if the film gets made in the future.

If you are interested in participating, please see the summary and character descriptions and submission instructions below. Please only submit for roles you feel you could portray accurately.

Roles will be cast on a first come, first serve basis.

WHERE: Online via zoom. Link will be sent to those cast a few days before the read. 

WHEN: April 12th 2-5pm
WHO: Emily Stephens

PROJECT: Judy or The Tale of the Bitch’s Chair (95 pages)

GENRE: Dark Comedy/Family Dramedy

SUMMARY: After her brother’s sudden death, a people-pleasing woman inherits the care of her impossible, manipulative mother—and must decide whether enduring her abuse is an act of love or a life she’s willing to abandon.

Narration

~~Judy - 70s, woman (ALREADY CAST) a narcissistic force of a woman who constantly controls, manipulates, and derails every person and situation she’s around.~~ 

Gabby - late 30s, woman, (trans actors encouraged to submit) - Judy’s daughter: a trans woman who can’t stop people pleasing even after she watches how it destroys her brother

Dave - 40s, man (ALREADY CAST) Judy’s son: an every man who is torn between his obligation to his mother and his family who are frustrated with his constant capitulation 

Alex - late 30s, non-binary, (Enbies encouraged to submit) - Gabby’s partner: A deeply practical and steady person who find themselves thrown off in the constant barrage of Judy’s presence and Gabby’s acquiescence

~~Lily - 30s, woman (ALREADY CAST) Dave’s partner: Feisty, disciplined and endlessly frustrated by Dave giving in to Judy. ~~

Madison - 15, girl - Dave and Lily’s daughter: wry, observational, and completely obsessed with her Aunt Gabby. She sees more than people think.

Loles - 60s, woman - A sensual, expressive, joyful Latina who is the closest thing Judy has to a friend

Madison and Loles are both smaller parts that will carry a number of other unnamed parts in the script.

SUBMIT TO: [emily.g.stephens@proton.me](mailto:emily.g.stephens@proton.me) with YOUR NAME, YOUR EMAIL, THE ROLE YOU ARE SUBMITTING FOR, and if you can commit to the entire timeframe for the table read.

**Please do not submit if you cannot commit to the entire timeframe for the table read.**

**Please only submit to roles you feel you could portray accurately.**

topComments.text: To clarify: this is not my script. This is Emily’s script. I cannot edit the post so just clarifying.

items.text:
Hello, we are casting for a PAID medical commercial shoot. Two actors for a half day of filming, indoors, with flexible dates. Please see information below for submission details. Age range is flexible as well.

Selected actors will also be offered additional paid roles this month for other medical commercials we have booked.

**Title**: Silver Moon

**Genre**: Drama

**Logline**: An aging darkroom enthusiast reconnects with his distant daughter, finally confronting their deteriorating relationship.

**Role**: The daughter, Martha. Mid-30s

**Compensation**: *No Compensation besides meals*

**Shooting** **Dates**: April 18 & April 19

**Location**: Denver, CO

Contact me if you’re interested!

Quentin Diaz

[801896@dpsk12.net](mailto:801896@dpsk12.net)

items.text:
Poszukuję charyzmatycznych osób do realizacji nagrań wideo w formacie TikTok dla akcesoriów samochodowych (dywaniki). Jeśli czujesz się swobodnie przed kamerą i lubisz tematykę automotive – to zlecenie dla Ciebie!
Szczegóły zlecenia:
• Data zdjęć: 14.04
• Czas pracy: ok. 6 -8 godzin max
• Lokalizacja: Myjnia samochodowa + plener
• Formuła: Sondy/opiniowanie, filmy eksperckie, testy jakości i wytrzymałości dywaników.
Kogo szukamy?
• Wiek: 22–30 lat (dziewczyny i chłopaki).
• Język: Polski (Native Speaker) – wymagana bardzo dobra dykcja
• Profil: Osoba kontaktowa, która nie boi się podchodzić do ludzi i potrafi ciekawie opowiadać o produkcie.
Wynagrodzenie:
• 700 PLN za dzień zdjęciowy - gotówka po planie ✅🎬🎥
Zgłoszenia:
Prosimy o przesłanie aplikacji na adres e-mail:tatianamakhdi@gmail.com
Temat - Auto 
W wiadomości należy podać:
1. Imię i nazwisko
2. Wiek
3. Wzrost
4. Numer telefonu
Wymagane załączniki:
• Kilka aktualnych zdjęć (twarz i sylwetka).
• Wizytówka w języku polskim – w formie linku do YouTube (warunek konieczny).

CASTING DO PIONOWEGO FILMU (VERTICAL) – WARSZAWA

Szukamy mężczyzn do epizodycznych ról w projekcie filmowym (format vertical).

Kogo szukamy:

— wiek: ok. 30–35 lat

— sylwetka: krępa / atletyczna

— wzrost: do 180 cm

Role:

Pomocnicy głównego bohatera (ochroniarza)

Pomocnik 1: udział we wszystkich dniach zdjęciowych

Pomocnik 2: udział tylko w dniach 12.04, 16.04, 17.04

W scenariuszu przewidzianych jest kilka kwestii w języku angielskim.

Terminy zdjęć:

Pomocnik 1: 10.04, 11.04, 12.04, 16.04, 17.04 (5 dni zdjęciowych)

Pomocnik 2: 12.04, 16.04, 17.04

Stawka:500 zł za dzień zdjęciowy (wypłata gotówką po każdym dniu zdjęciowym)

Zainteresowanych prosimy o przesyłanie swoich aktualnych zdjęć.Czekamy na zgłoszenia!

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

1) Bobas, Rafał Bobiński (34) – bandyta średniego szczebla, średnio bystry, dość bojowy, lubi pyskować. Dobrze zbudowany, o twarzy osiłka, do zadań fizycznych. Jasne dżinsy, biały tshirt, dresiarski wygląd. W zainteresowaniu policji. Uwaga: opcjonalnie może zagrać krótki fight z Kubą – do decyzji, jeśli uda się znaleźć odpowiednią osobę. AKTOR ZAWODOWY 
Data: 20.04 i 21.04
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za 2 dni

2) Krzywy, Marcin Krzywański (38) – bandyta średniego szczebla, dość przenikliwy, typ obserwatora. Lojalny, stanowczy. Sprawny fizycznie ale nie kafar. Ciemne dżinsy, czarny tshirt, stara się nie rzucać w oczy. Był zamieszany w kilka spraw, ale niczego mu nie udowodniono. AKTOR ZAWODOWY
Data: 20.04 i 21.04
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za 2 dni

3) Jarosław Fryc (39) – bandyta wyższego szczebla, cwany, zawsze wywija się policji. Skuteczny, bystry, umie zarządzać ludźmi, pewny siebie. Wynajęty do skoordynowania akcji porwania komendantów. Dobre dżinsy, koszula, wygląda jak sprawny fizycznie biznesmen. 
Data: 20.04
Stawka: 500 zł netto

4) Adrian Marciniak (38) – przyjaciel Szymona, działa w półświatku, nie zrobił nic złego ale miał pecha i Bobas z Krzywym prewencyjnie go zabili. Średniej postury, nie ma wyglądu dresiarza.
Data: 21.04
Stawka: 400 zł netto

5) Mundurowa 1 (25-35)
Data: 21.04
Stawka: 300 zł netto

6)  Marzena Wolniak (19) – atrakcyjna studentka. Dorabia na portalu erotycznym. Ofiara molestowania, stalkingu i próby gwałtu.
Data: 21.04
Stawka: 600 zł netto

7) Kasia (22) – studentka, typ opiekuńczej i empatycznej przyjaciółki.
Data: 21.04 i 25.04
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

8) Paweł Kornecki (28)  – stalker, niedoszły gwałciciel. Ma obsesję na punkcie Marzeny, klient na jej portalu erotycznym. Niczym się nie wyróżnia. Krótkie włosy, tanie okulary. Pracuje jako kierowca. 
Data: 22.04 i 25.04
Stawka: 1200 zł netto za 2 dni

9) Nikodem Janiak (24) – drobny diler, złodziej. Typ dresika-kryminalisty. 
Data: 21.04
Stawka:400 zł netto

10) Właściciel (weterynarz) (48) – właściciel przychodni weterynaryjnej, miłośnik zwierząt. Dobry, poczciwy człowiek, ale trochę naiwny. Barwny wygląd, nietypowe ubranie. 
Data: 22.04
Stawka: 400 zł netto

11) Mariusz Tkaczyk (26) – były student chemii, inteligentny. Facet, który zszedł na złą drogę, chcąc się szybko dorobić. 
PRAWO JAZDY!!!
Data: 21.04 i 22.04
Stawka: 1200 zł za 2 dni

Zgłoszenia przyjmujemy TYLKO MAILOWO.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem
- Aktualne zdjęcie

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
# 2 MALE ACTORS NEEDED

Hello! I am a student at Indiana University looking for 2 ACTORS for a very short film on Tuesday, **April 14th!!** 

The roles are of a prisoner and a researcher. 

We need **two male actors** for these parts. 

The prisoner is preferred to have buzzed/short hair but not required. 

The researcher would be a voice acting position with possible silhouette work- needs to be able to imitate a voice in their 40's/50's.

Please message me for more information such as the script, further role description, or any questions you may have!!

topComments.text: Hello Olivia Martin. I hope you’re well. Is this paid?
This production will take place in Bloomington, IN !!

I need several actors to play me as a 10 year old, my mom and Dad as early twenties, me again at age 30 something and maybe some extras. This is going to be a big project. Please message me if interested or if you know of anyone who could do it. Thank you!

Feel free to share and post on your social media pages to spread the word. items.text:
📣🎬 CASTING CALL – SITCOM PILOT (PROOF OF CONCEPT)

We are casting lead and supporting speaking roles for The Rake, a sitcom pilot being developed by BA Filmmaking students at UWE Bristol.

The project will involve filming one key scene as a proof of concept in Bristol on either 27th or 28th April 2026 (1-day shoot). This is a student production, unpaid, with travel expenses and food provided. The scene will form part of a proof of concept for a sitcom in development, to be used for portfolio purposes, festival submission, and as part of a press kit for pitching the project to production companies.

STORY: The Rake is a character-driven comedy set in a once-popular live music venue now struggling to stay afloat, following a music-obsessed supervisor trying to restore it to its former glory, as a new manager pushes it in a completely different direction.

ROLES:

OMAR: Male, 20s, Arab
A music-obsessed supervisor trying to save a failing venue, torn between passion and business.

AISHA: Female, 20s, Arab
Works at The Rake—no one really knows what she does. Omar’s best friend. Chaotic, sarcastic, and secretly invested in the venue.

SEBASTIAN: Male, early 20s, White
Thinks he runs the bar. Loud, arrogant, and desperate for Omar’s approval. Takes Harper on as his “protégé.”

HARPER: Female, 18+, Any ethnicity
New to The Rake. Quiet and nervous at first, but with a sharper edge underneath. Trying to make a good impression while dealing with Sebastian’s ego.

KEY INFO:
Location: Bristol
Shoot date: 27th or 28th April 2026 (1 day)
Payment: Voluntary (travel expenses & food provided)
Seeking Bristol-based actors

TO APPLY: Please send a headshot and CV (or Spotlight / Mandy link) to: therakeseries@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING CALL - “The Sins of Our Father” - NON-UNION

Hi everyone! My name is Emma and I’m the associate producer for the upcoming feature film The Sins of Our Father. We are still looking to cast 2 roles!

Filming will be taking place mid May to mid August, every second weekend approximately (tentatively), in the greater Vancouver area. It is a volunteer project (with IMDb credit, meals provided, copy, and great company).

If you are interested in being apart of this amazing project please email your demo reel, resume, and the name of the character you’re auditioning for to thesinsofourfatherfilm@gmail.com by Wednesday April 8th.

Synopsis:

The Sins of Our Father dissects the crumbling legacy of the Montgomery family in a narrative that blends gritty family drama with surreal, lo-fi sci-fi.

The story begins with Clive, a dying pawnshop owner and lifelong hustler who attempts one final con: using a mysterious, memory-altering projector to force a reconciliation with his estranged children. With his twisted understanding of fatherhood, he plans to "overwrite" their trauma to stage one final, perfect memory.

The film unfolds in an exploration of the fallouts with his three children: Maddie, the eldest, paralyzed by the fear of inheriting her father’s toxicity; Leland, a debt-ridden filmmaker shooting adult content to survive; and Julian, a recluse who has signed a "deal with the devil" by accepting tuition sponsorship from Clive’s ruthless rival, Vance.

The plan shatters when Clive misuses the device. As the siblings uncover the truth, their own demons collide with external threats—including Vance and a gang of "trustafarian" loan sharks—who descend on the family home to seize the mysterious projector.

In a chaotic climax that blurs the line between memory and reality, the siblings must weaponize the device to escape. Ultimately, Clive makes the only selfless choice of his life, resulting in his children finally being free.

items.text:
Casting Call - A Curated Exit (Theatre, paid, non-union)
**Production Company**

Shot in the Dark Productions

**Producer(s)**

Kristy Woollam and Richard White

**Director:**

Richard White

**Union Status**

Non-Union

**Project Type**

Theatre / Live Performance

**Compensation Details**

Profit Share

**Performance Date(s) and Locations**

Winnipeg International Fringe Festival July 13-26, 2026

Edmonton International Fringe Festival August 11-23, 2026

Vancouver - 3 night run, fall 2026 (TBD)

**Submission Deadline**

April 8th, 2026

**Audition Dates and Location**

Vancouver. Call backs week of April 20 - 26th.

**Submission Instructions**

Please contact Kristywoollam@gmail.com to receive sides for a self tape.

Please submit your headshot, acting resume, and self tape to Kristywoollam@gmail.com.

**Project Synopsis**

A Curated Exit is a one act contemporary drama with strong comedic elements. It examines grief, love, and the commercialization of death. Zoe, a funeral director, sells The Device, nanotechnology that vaporizes the body at death and replaces it with a programmed experience. When her husband Steve dies suddenly, Zoe's quest to craft perfect endings collides with loss, memory, and the fragile line between technology and humanity.

**Casting for:**

STEVE Male lead. Any ethnicity. Age 30-50. Steve is a high school history teacher. He's a geek and loves pop culture. He is gentle and playful and often uses jokes to deflect direct questions about his emotions. He has a strong sense of social justice. Steve loves his wife deeply, but dies suddenly without telling her his biggest secret.

🎭✨ BIG NEWS ✨🎭

We’re so excited to announce our brand NEW Transition Year programme in partnership with Ashfield College!

Now you can combine top-class academic learning with professional Musical Theatre training.  The perfect balance of education and creativity with both studio and real, in school academic excellence  💫

🎶 Train in singing, acting & dance
📚 Achieve excellence in your academic studies preparing you for Leaving Cert and beyond 
🌟 Build confidence, skills & lifelong friendships

If you’ve ever dreamed of performing while staying on track academically, this is YOUR moment.

🎟️ Limited places available so don’t miss out! Open day and Registration info coming soon. 

#transitionyear #musicaltheatre #performingarts #tyireland #fulltime

items.text:
CASTING CALL - UCL GOTHIC SHORT
We are casting for an upcoming visually striking gothic short film and are looking for performers to bring this eerie, stylised world to life.

ROLES:

Unnamed Protagonist (Female, early 20s)

A self-aware young woman whose controlled, expressive presence gradually gives way to stillness as she becomes fixed into image. Strong screen presence and subtle emotional control required.

Victorian Gothic Heroine (Female, early 20s)

A composed, almost painterly figure of stillness and restraint, embodying the completed gothic form the protagonist transforms into. Ability to convey emotion through minimal movement is key.

Friend 1 & Friend 2 (Female, early 20s)

Playful, spontaneous university students who help establish a natural, social world through light improvisation. Strong chemistry and naturalistic acting preferred.

Extras – Halloween Party Goers

Background performers to help create an immersive, atmospheric party setting.

DETAILS:

📍 Filming in London

📅 18th & 19th April

🎬 Unpaid – but an amazing opportunity to gain experience on a highly stylised, professional, and creatively ambitious student production. Perfect for building your showreel and collaborating with a passionate team.

If interested, please email dtnvslb@ucl.ac.uk with your headshot and showreel.

items.text:
Casting Call for a student short film that I am filming next week. Relevant information is included as attached. 

If you have any questions, or if you are interested, please email me at Osworld.media@gmail.com and provide a headshot and/or small showreel, and I shall provide a copy of the script and discuss futher with you.

I am looking for a male and female aged 30+ to play the roles of the mother and father of my protagonist. The parents are featured in two scenes in the film, totalling to approximately 3-4 minutes of sceen time.

Please respond as soon as you can if you are interested, as filming will take place on Monday 13th April.

Many thanks

items.text:
Hi everyone! We are looking for extras for our
unpaid student film, Better Man.
We’re filming scenes set in a café, a bar, a concert, and a pub. We are looking for people who’d be up for helping bring those environments to life on screen.
This is an unpaid student project, but it’s a great chance to get involved in a film production, gain some on-set experience, and support an independent project.
If you’re interested and would like more information, please message us directly. Thanks so much!

items.text:
Seattle WA
FlightTime Productions proudly presents auditions for the upcoming Short Film:

                     Amelia, Once More

We are seeking cast members of all kinds: adult men, women and children. Must be 16+ to audition for the production. 

Non-Union Actors Only!

Auditions are by appointment only:

Friday, April 3rd, 2026

12PM, 1PM, 2PM, 3PM & 4PM

To sign up for a free audition appointment, please email an updated copy of your headshot and acting resume to ameliastageplay@gmail.com. Please also list two available audition times you are available to audition at.

Auditions will be held at:

Seattle Public Library- Ballard Branch

5614 22nd Ave. N.W. 

Seattle, WA 98107

*This event is NOT hosted, sponsored, or endorsed by The Seattle Public Library*

For auditions, please prepare a 1-minute monologue of your choice. Preferably a comedic or dramatic monologue that can show your talent range. Please note, improvisation skills are definitely important for the production. You will also be acting out parts from the short film with other actors for the audition process.

If cast, there will be rehearsal schedule meeting to discuss availability as well as the show schedule. A stipend will be paid out to all actors involved in the film.

Filming will begin in July 2026 for a 3-6 week timeframe.

items.text:
Casting Actors Paid Commercial Non-Union - Chromie Health

Chromie Health is casting actors for a short comedic commercial promoting Chromie Health, a healthcare staffing platform.

Shoot Date: Tuesday, April 7 @ 12pm-6pm 

Location: Burbank / North Hollywood, CA

Union Status: Non-Union

Roles

Sarah – Charge Nurse (Principal)

Female, 20–60. Confident, experienced hospital charge nurse explaining the realities of last-minute staffing shortages to the hospital CFO. Strong natural delivery with light comedic timing.

Hospital Staff – Background (5 roles)

All genders, 20–65. Portraying hospital staff such as nurses or administrators in a nurse station / hospital office setting.

Rate

• Principal roles: $150/day

• Background: $100/day

• Meals provided, credit

Usage

Digital commercial / online marketing.

To Submit

Please email: castingchromie@gmail.com

Include:

• Headshot

• Résumé

• Reel (if available)

Subject Line:

ROLE – ACTOR NAME

Example:

Sarah – Jane Smith

If you have any questions, please reach out. Thank you!

topComments.text: I’d like to do that but I need wardrobe, is that provided?

items.text:
Ihre Hochzeit – Einzigartig. Elegant. Unvergesslich. ✨

Sie suchen das Besondere für Ihren großen Tag? Jemanden, der Professionalität mit echter Leidenschaft verbindet?

Egal ob Sie eine emotionale Begleitung durch eine Sängerin, einen souveränen Master of Ceremony oder einen mitreißenden Special Act suchen – ich biete Ihnen themenbezogene Eleganz und ein Programm mit Herz.

Warum ich der richtige Partner an Ihrer Seite bin?

Weil ich Ihre Feier aus jeder Perspektive verstehe. Seit über 30 Jahren bin ich als gelernter Eventmanager, Gastronom und Künstler auf kleinen und großen Festen zu Hause. Diese einzigartige Kombination garantiert Ihnen Kompetenz, Empathie und einen unvergesslichen Ablauf.

✉️ Bereit für ein Fest der Extraklasse? 

Kontaktieren Sie mich jetzt für einen Termin zum kostenloses Vorgespräch! Ich freue mich auf Ihre Nachricht.

📧 office-leipzig@web.de
☎️ 034202 154910

#hochzeitssängerin #masterofceremony #hochzeit2026 #eventprofi #specialact #mathiasmariekaiser

items.text:
🎬 Kreative in Dortmund/Bochum gesucht!
Hey zusammen,

ich baue aktuell ein kleines, Content-Team Schauspieler*innen im Raum Dortmund/Bochum auf. Ziel ist es, wöchentlich cinematischen, hochwertigen Content zu produzieren und uns langfristig gemeinsam weiterzuentwickeln.

Ich bin aufstrebender Schauspieler und habe bereits konkrete Ideen sowie eine klare Vision für den Content (cinematisch, relatable, im Filmstil).

Wenn du Leidenschaft für Content Creation hast und Teil von etwas Konsequentem und Ernsthaftem sein möchtest, melde dich gerne bei mir!

items.text:
Looking for strong, intentional performers for a cinematic short film SoCal area
I’m casting:

— THE MYSTERY MAN (Antagonist)

— THE CAPTURED MAN (Lead)

— HENCHMEN (2)

This is a performance-driven project focused on presence, tension, and visual storytelling. Looking for actors who can bring depth, control, and authenticity to the screen.

items.text:
Method Acting «Die sieben grossen Emotionen»

Letzte Plätze!!!

Du willst:
* die sieben global verbreiteten Emotionen Glück, Trauer, Wut, Angst, Überraschung, Ekel und Verachtung erarbeiten
* die sieben grossen Emotionen in unterschiedlichen Übungen, Improvisationen, Monologen und Szenen ausprobieren und anwenden
* diese Emotionen zuverlässig abrufen, halten, in der Intensität und Dauer variieren und auch wieder aus ihnen aussteigen können
* die Fähigkeit erlernen, in Zukunft alle gewünschten Emotionen schauspielerisch zu entwickeln
* die neuesten Erkenntnissen der Emotionen-Forschung integrieren
* Von mehr als 40 Jahren Erfahrung profitieren

Dann ist dieser Kurs genau das richtige für DICH!

Und das sagen Teilnehmer*innen:

„Für mich stellt der Schauspiel Unterricht auch ein sehr guter Ausgleich zu meinem Büro-Dasein dar und es macht mir viel Spass während des kreativen Prozesses neue Seiten an mir zu entdecken und mich selber und andere (fiktive) Personen besser kennenzulernen. Liebe Grüsse und grosses Lob an dich; ich bin immer wieder begeistert darüber, wie du uns in verschiedene Situationen und Emotionen „hineinreden“ kannst.“ M.

„Vielen Dank für die tollen Kursabende, ich konnte viel lernen und ausprobieren!“ S.

„Du machst es super mit uns allen und die entstehende energy tut mir sehr gut.“ M-R.

„Danke vielmals für Deine Infos und die Lektüre. Es war für mich eine lehrreiche und intensive Zeit. Ich habe Dir gerne zugehört, da Du die Inhalte klar, strukturiert und interessant auf Augenhöhe vermittelt hast. Auch hat mir das Zusammenspiel oder Wirken mit den anderen Teilnehmern gefallen, sei es in den Vorbereitungen oder in den Szenen. Auch einen Einblick hinter die Kulissen zu bekommen, fand ich sehr spannend.“ N.

„Ich werde es nicht los, mich wenigstens schriftlich nochmals bei Dir zu melden und von Herzen für Deine Worte und Dein Verständnis zu bedanken.

Als ich gestern um 18:30 in den Kurs kam, war ich am Anschlag, ohne Energie und völlig ausgelaugt und als ich um … den Zug nach … nahm, spürte ich in mir wieder ein bisschen Leben und positive Energie. Und das war nicht das erste Mal. Bis jetzt war es nach jedem Kurs so. Einfach um Dir zu sagen, dass dein Kurs mir sehr viel bedeutet und auch sehr viel gibt. Ich habe jetzt schon unglaublich viel gelernt, insbesondere auch über mich.“ M.

„Deine Hilfe ist unverzichtbar damit ich … mein Talent in Zukunft als Schauspieler unter Beweis stellen kann!“ P.

„Your training helped, Marco. A teammate told me it was „like real method acting“. I told them I took method acting. They didn’t know that when hiring me.“ A.

(Die Testimonials sind aus Datenschutzgründen anonymisiert. Du willst noch mehr Testimonials? Dann lese auf der Website und auf Google weiter.)

Du willst es genau wissen. Auf der Website findest du alles, was du brauchst:
* Alle Details zum Kurs
* Testimonials / Bewertungen
* Die Anmeldung

ZES Zentrum für Entwicklung im Schauspiel, das Kompetenzzentrum für Gefühle, Emotionen, Stimmungen und Atmosphären

https://zes-info.ch/die-7-grossen-emotionen/

sharedPost.text:
Stimmtraining für Tanzlehrende mit Stefanie Rummel
Mitreißender 3-stündiger interaktiver Vortrag, der stimmlich viel bewegt hat! 🎤💃
Vielen Dank für die tolle Weiterempfehlung! 🤍 @gassnertorsten

Der Talk „Stimmliche Stärke & Stimmgesundheit für Tanzlehrende“ war ein voller Erfolg! 🔥
Wir haben maßgeschneiderte Lösungen erarbeitet, geübt, entdeckt und herzlich gelacht. Am Ende: Standing Ovations! 🙌
Ein inspirierender Tag, der mich und viele bewegt hat.
Stimme geben ist essenziell! 💃🗣️
Danke INTAKO Kongress für Tanz in Düsseldorf! ✨

translate the last post into English

**Voice Training for Dance Teachers with Stefanie Rummel**  
Thrilling 3-hour interactive lecture that really moved voices! 🎤💃  

Thank you so much for the great recommendation! 🤍 @gassnertorsten  

The talk "Vocal Strength & Voice Health for Dance Teachers" was a huge success! 🔥  

We developed tailored solutions, practiced, discovered, and laughed heartily. In the end: Standing ovations! 🙌  
An inspiring day that moved me and many others.  

Giving voice is essential! 💃🗣️  
Thanks @IntakoDüsseldorf – Dance Congress! ✨

items.text:
CASTING CALL - INDEPENDENT LIMITED SERIES.
Duality: The series -* In a world where every choice splits in two, four young friends must confront the dangerous collisions of their parallel selves - blurring the lines between who they want to be and who they are expected to be.*

***DUALITY: THE SERIES*** is a 4 part limited series that highlights the themes of **Mental health, identity, Friendships, growth** and more. 

The series follows a group of young adults grappling with the perception of who they are. As their inner struggles manifest outwardly, they are forced to reckon with regret and isolation and the unsettling question of which **“self” **is the truest. 

Blurring the lines between reality and perception, the series explores** identity, morality, **and the quiet battles we face within - showing how the greatest conflict is not with others, but with ourselves. 

ROLES

Main role 

Aniya

18

White ( Any ethnicity )

18 - 23 - actors ages 

*Know how to sing*

Link to Audition - https://forms.gle/epsTLs7Lh5aSHyWr7

July & August

Supporting Role 

Malik

45

Black ( Any ethnicity )

25 - 47 (Actors ages)

Link to audition - https://forms.gle/oTH992KpQC4hRen66

July & August (only needed for a few days)

Compensation - Accommodation & Travel covered

Filming Location: Manchester, UK

Deadline to submit tape 12/04/26 - extension given if requested.

Do kolejnego odcinka serialu GLINIARZE realizowanego w Warszawie (oraz bliskich okolicach) szukam:

- Katarzyna Olszewska (38) – wystraszona mama zaginionego Sylwka. Z zawodu pielęgniarka. Ubiera się schludnie, ale wygodnie. Opiekuńcza i zaradna. Uwaga: Brunetka. 
Data: 17.04 
+  możliwa kontynuacja czyli 1 dzień pomiędzy: 5.05 a 9.05.
Stawka: 600 zł za dzień

- Sylwek Olszewski (13) – dzielny urwis, którego poznajemy w chwili, kiedy ucieka przestraszony.
Data: 17.04 
+  możliwa kontynuacja czyli 1 dzień pomiędzy: 5.05 a 9.05.
Stawka: 400 zł za dzień

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o zgłoszenia wyłącznie na adres: outsetola@op.pl

W tytule e-maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.
W treści:
- Wiek, wzrost, waga
- Numer telefonu
- Informacje o dotychczasowym doświadczeniu przed kamerą
- Linki do swoich materiałów video: wizytówka/demo/scenki ze swoim udziałem
- Aktualne zdjęcie
Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu i noclegu.

items.text:
Do kolejnego odcinka 21. sezonu serialu „Gliniarze”, realizowanego w Warszawie (i bliskich okolicach) poszukuję odtwórców do następujacych ról:

1. Igi (18) – Od początku historii martwy. Pogubiony, romantyczny nastolatek z MOW-u. Rola BEZ TEKSTU

Data: 17 kwietnia + kontynuacja 
- 1 dzień pomiędzy 27.04 - 01.05
Stawka: 600 zł netto za całość

2. Grzegorz Krawczyk (30) – diler, zostaje zamordowany, niewyróżniające się ubranie w stylu sportowym, cwaniak. 

Data: 15. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

3. Klient (28) – klient dilera, dresy, czapka z daszkiem, nie wygląda na narkomana, tylko „rekreacyjnie” zażywającego, zestresowany. 

Data: 15. kwietnia
Stawka: 300 zł netto

4. Siwy, Mateusz Siwek (44) – boss narkotykowy, bezwzględny, wzbudza respekt, mściwy, ceni lojalność, ale potrafi kalkulować. Może być napakowany, łysy.

Data: 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 600 zł netto

5. Gangster 1 (34) – człowiek Siwego, jego prawa ręka, uzbrojony, wygadany, 

Data: 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 500 zł netto

6.Porywacz 1 (30) – zbir i kryminalista.

Data: 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

7.Jaworski (26) – kryminalista, który poszedł na współpracę z prokuraturą. Typ drobnego cwaniaczka. KONIECZNE PRAWO JAZDY

Data: 13. i 14. kwietnia
Stawka: 1400 zł netto za całość

8.Gangus (37) – napakowany zbir z szajki narkotykowej. 

Data: 13. kwietnia
Stawka: 400 zł netto

Proszę o zgłoszenia TYLKO mailowe

Chętne osoby zapraszam do wysyłania zgłoszeń na adres: casting.outset@interia.pl

W tytule maila proszę o wpisanie nazwy postaci.

W treści maila proszę o zawarcie następujących informacji:

1. Wiek/wzrost/waga
2. Nr tel. Do kontaktu
3. Linki do sowich materiałów video – demo/wizytówka/scenki castingowe
4. Aktualne zdjęcie
5. Krótki opis doświadczenia
6. Informacje o ukończonych szkołach/kursach/warsztatach aktorskich
7. Informację o posiadanym i czynnym prawie jazdy lub jego braku

Nie zwracamy kosztów dojazdu/noclegu

items.text:
Kære medlem, Vi har filtreret inaktive medlemmer, og vi vil gøre det igen, så hvis du ser dette opslag, så sig noget for at blive i gruppen. Tak.
Cremeret agurke- og rejesalat
Ingredienser:
Til salaten:
450 g kogte rejer, pillede og rensede
2 store agurker, tyndt skåret
2,5 dl cherrytomater, halverede
Jeg elsker denne hurtige og nemme opskrift. Sig venligst noget verbalt for at blive ved med at modtage mine opskrifter.. Tak..
Opskrift i (c.o.m.m.e.n.t)…....

items.text:
BIG GUYS AGENCY welcomes Troy Faruk to the roster.

With over 15 years of experience in film and television, Troy brings authentic tactical movement, stunt expertise, and commanding on-screen presence.

A military veteran with a background in high-impact action, wire work, stunt coordination, and tactical choreography, Troy is built for roles that demand realism — from federal agents and detectives to military operators and intelligence specialists.

Casting inquiries:
BIG GUYS AGENCY

items.text:
ISO: Male actor, 30's, Comedy shooting THIS Wednesday in DTLA.
Hey everyone! I'm shooting pickups for a short comedy I'm directing/wrote/producing. Shooting THIS Wednesday April 8th 12pm-2pm in DTLA. Will be about an hour. Paid + credit!

Production company is GTE Productions (SXSW, Sitges, Cannes, Apple, Hulu + more).

MR. TRENCHCOAT WITH HANDLEBARS (M, 30’s), think hipster meets a California cowboy type wearing a trench coat and rocking a handlebar mustache. Open ethnicity and open to tattoos, piercing, etc. JUST must have permission from tattoo artists. Also, open to influencer/content creator types.

Basically, this is a funny flash back scene. All SOC, no lines but a character moment.

Please email info@gteproductionsinc.com with headshot.

THANK YOU!

items.text:
There’s an **exclusive virtual talent event** coming up featuring legendary casting director Ricky Masler, with **350+ IMDb credits** and years of real industry experience.

She’s hosting a **live Q&A on April 15th**, and it’s a great opportunity to hear directly from someone who’s been on the casting side at a high level.

These kinds of sessions are where you really start to understand:
– What casting directors are actually looking for
– Common mistakes actors make
– How to stand out in auditions

It’s also a chance to ask your own questions and get real, unfiltered insight.

Spots are limited since it’s a more exclusive event.

If anyone’s interested in attending or wants more details, feel free to comment or message me 👍

items.text:
**Looking for 1st Assistant Director (1st AD) – Short Film "Silent Resilience"**

Hi everyone! I’m currently looking for an **experienced 1st AD** to join our upcoming narrative short film.

This is a **festival-driven project** focusing on social realism, with plans for international festival submissions (including Berlinale).

📍 **Location:** Toronto (North York Civic Centre + Downtown)
📅 **Shoot Dates:** April 18–20, 2026

🔹 About the Film

"Silent Resilience" tells the story of a Chinese immigrant woman fighting for unpaid wages in a system that refuses to respond.
The film explores themes of **labour injustice, silence, and dignity**, with a grounded, realistic visual style.

🔹 What We’re Looking For

• Prior experience as a **1st AD on narrative films (shorts or features)**
• Strong understanding of on-set workflow, scheduling & crew coordination
• Comfortable working in a **fast-paced, low-budget indie environment**
• Strong communication skills (English required, Mandarin is a plus)
• Experience with **festival-level or professional sets preferred**

🔹 Responsibilities

• Run the set and maintain shooting schedule
• Coordinate between director, DP, cast & crew
• Assist with script breakdown & call sheets
• Manage background actors (large protest scene)

🔹 Compensation

• Paid (low-budget indie rate, based on experience)
• IMDb credit
• Opportunity to collaborate on a **festival-level project**

📩 **To apply, please DM me or email:**
**zoeyfilm77@gmail.com**

Please include:
• Your experience / resume
• Previous work (if available)

🙏 Feel free to share or tag someone who might be a good fit. Thank you!

items.text:
I’m Richard Brown, the President of Scenic View Pictures.  I’ve been in the industry for 17 years and have produced, written and directed award winning screenplays and films.  My company specializes in film budgeting, script breakdowns, permitting and union guidelines.  

Our script breakdown service involves your screenplay being broken down into lists of props, wardrobe, characters and locations.

An estimated shooting schedule and budget is then drafted based on current market research into the following costs:  acting/crew unions, permits, catering, craft services, insurance, props, lodging, travel reimbursement, location fees, post production, venue fees, etc.

Here are the costs associated with each script length:

- Short Script Breakdown and Budget Package - Script under 30 pages.  $30/hour with six hour minimum charge.

- Mid Length Script Breakdown and Budget Package - Script between 30 to 50 pages.  $40/hour with ten hour minimum charge.

- Feature Length Script Breakdown and Budget Package - Script over 50 pages.  $50/hour with sixteen hour minimum charge.

If you are interested in any of these services and want to schedule an engagement call, please email at richardbrown.filmmaker@gmail.com.

I look forward to helping you bring your film to life.

items.text:
Hi, my name is Lucas Woolrich. I’m planning to make a new Batman fan film which will be uploaded to Youtube. The film is titled BATMAN VENGEANCE which will be a loose adaptation of the BATMAN HEAT comic book storyline. The story for the film sees Batman teaming up with Catwoman to track down a psychopathic serial killer known as Catman.

**I’m looking to cast the role of CATWOMAN for the film. Filming will be in Manchester UK. Payment is £20 an hour.**

Applicants must be 18 years old and over. Please e-mail me at [superheroes4@outlook.com](mailto:superheroes4@outlook.com) and send your resumes and headshots if you’re interested. Thanks.

items.text:
THE MEETING
A gripping and imaginative drama that stages a fictional encounter between two of the most influential leaders of the Civil Rights Movement: Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. and Malcolm X. Set in a Harlem hotel room in 1965, the play brings these towering figures together for an intense, intimate, and deeply human conversation about justice, strategy, and the future of Black America.April 17th to May 3rd

items.text:
The time has finally come everyone! As of 3-10-2026 'Gloria' (a feature film based on a real couple from El Paso, Texas in the 1930's) is available to rent or buy on Amazon Prime. This film was completely shot in El Paso, Texas.  Also available for DVD purchase on Amazon. 🎥🙂
Feel free to share and post on your social media pages to spread the word. If you would like to be part of our social media campaign feel free to send a direct message to our Gloria Instagram page viewing the film along with the names of those you'd like us to tag. You'll then see your picture or video pop up on our The Gloria Movie     Facebook page and Gloria Instagram page. 😊🎬 We have arrived to share with the public. Thank you Amazon Prime! 🙏🎬🎉🙌�

Gloria Instagram link below: 

https://www.instagram.com/thegloriamovie?igsh=dm5rYTVvZ3B6ZjBi

Amazon (Buy/Rent):

https://www.amazon.com/gp/video/detail/B0GL251YNY/

sharedPost.text:
---

🌀🎬🎥🌚 Exclusive Acting Workshop – Final Version .version A.

VERY LOW COST: One-on-One Online via Skype

"This course integrates the poetic realism of Tarkovsky, the practical wisdom of Michael Caine, and the transformative techniques of Stanislavski and Method Acting. Designed to deepen your craft, it focuses on authentic emotional connection and powerful storytelling."

🎬 Created by a British Cinematographer/Director with 31 Years of Experience and 32 Features to His Name

🌐 International Experience: Having worked on films worldwide, collaborating with actors and directors, I bring real-world insights from both sides of the camera. This course is designed to give actors a deep understanding of their craft, emphasizing emotional depth and character development.

🌐 IMDb: www.imdb.com/name/nm1806508

🌐 Showreel: https://enkiproductions1.8b.io

---

🤔 What You Will Learn:

🌀 Emotional Range: Master the ability to express a full spectrum of emotions, making your performances more believable and compelling.

🌀 Character Development: Create rich, multidimensional characters by exploring their internal world, external actions, and backstory.

🌀 Method Acting: Use personal experiences and emotions to deliver raw, authentic performances.

🌀 Working with Directors and Crew: Learn how to hit marks, understand shooting ratios, and collaborate with crew members to enhance your performance.

🌀 Scene Preparation: Techniques for script interpretation, emotional connection, and performing under pressure.

🌀 Industry Standards: How to create a professional showreel and work effectively with casting directors and filmmakers.

---

🎬 Day 1: Moment-to-Moment Acting (Stanislavski’s Approach)

🔹 Breaking a Scene Down: The use of internal visualization and meditation to "become" the character.

Character Exercise: The Hitman’s First Kill

📍 Scene: A low-rent hotel room in Manhattan, lit by a dull winter’s midday light. The sad hum of a ceiling fan, distant sirens, muted traffic below. On the bed—a brand-new sniper rifle.

🔹 Exercise 1 (Singular Emotion): Enter the room, pick up the gun, examine it, and prepare for the target. Remain fully in character.

🔹 Exercise 2 (Multiple Emotional Shifts):

1. Enter slightly out of breath, feeling relief—"I made it here. No one saw me."

2. The weight of reality sets in—"Am I really about to kill someone?"

3. Mesmerized by the artistry of the gun—draw on memories of seeing/touching weapons.

4. Snapped back to reality by a siren—trace the feeling of waking from a dream.

5. Decision made—move to the window, set up the gun, and wait.

🔹 Discussion: How do actors like Heath Ledger, Daniel Day-Lewis, and Dustin Hoffman make their characters so real? Insights from my own experiences on set with actors who never broke character—even during dinner.

Exercise 3 (If Time Allows): The Phone Call

📍 Scene: You’ve done something terrible—enough to make the person you love most leave forever. You must convince them to stay.

🎭 Goal: Improvise, using pure emotional truth, until the performance is undeniably real.

---

🎬 Day 2: Making Your Character Believable

🔹 Understanding the Psyche: Whether playing a killer or an ordinary person, you must know your character’s mind.

Character Exercise: The Breaking Point

📍 Scene: A crowded supermarket. A tired voice announces deals over the PA. You feel unseen, unheard, frustrated—until suddenly, you’re holding an AK-47. (Note: These scenes are purely acting exercises. They can be altered if a student is uncomfortable.)

🔹 Alternative Scene: A character about to detonate a bomb, written in the style of Heath Ledger’s Joker.

🔹 Alternative Scene: A video call to the person you love most—telling them why. (Scripted or improv.)

📍 Final Monologue Exercise: "Hi everyone… Tomorrow’s going to be different." The last words before an irreversible decision.

🔹 Accents: Versatility in performance—working with British, American (Deep South), and Northern Irish accents.

🔹 Final Exercise: The Power of Stillness—sit before the camera, smiling, at total peace. Convey pure serenity.

---

🎬 Day 3: Working with a Director and Crew

🔹 Understanding Your Role: How an actor fits into the filmmaking process.

🔹 Hitting Marks & Lighting: The technical side of making performances shine.

🔹 Shooting Ratios: How they affect your performance.

🔹 Crew Collaboration: Understanding continuity, sound, makeup, cinematography, and direction.

Final Showreel Scenes (Day 3):

🎭 Sinister: "So you really think you got away with it? You really think that?" (Improv)

🎭 Heartbroken: "But I didn’t mean it... please, please, don’t leave me…" (Improv)

🎭 Insane (Joker-like): "Mmm... if E = mc², then time versus chaos... who cares?" (Improv)

🎭 Flat & Emotionless: "We’re born, we live, we die. That’s it." (Improv)

🔹 Goal: Draw from personal experiences and trace memories to make the performances deeply real.

---

🎬 Day 4: Fear and Survival – Personal Experience & Character Creation

🔹 Deep Dive: Exploring fear, survival, and desperation in character work.

Exercise 1: The Jungle Escape

📍 Scene: You’re lost in the jungle at night, exhausted, your breath the only sound. Every step is agony, but stopping means death. You call out—pleading for help. No answer.

🎭 Emotions to Explore:

1. Fear of death – the realization that no one is coming.

2. Desperation – the raw instinct to survive.

3. Physical exhaustion – feeling your body give in.

🎭 Method Process:

1. Internal Visualization – Close your eyes, hear the insects, the rustling leaves, your pounding heartbeat.

2. Personal Connection – Recall a moment when you felt completely lost or afraid.

3. Scene Execution – Let the emotions guide your body and voice.

Exercise 2: The Phone Call Redux

📍 Scene: You’re on the phone with a loved one. You need their help. If they refuse, it’s over. What do you say? What do you leave out?

🎭 Objective: Make the desperation feel real. This is life or death.

---

Final Performance (Day 4):

Students will perform a final emotional scene, bringing together everything they’ve learned. These performances will be recorded as raw material for their showreel.

---

🎬🎥 Ready to Elevate Your Acting?

This isn’t just a class—it’s an intense, immersive experience that will change the way you act forever.

🌐 To Enroll: p.m.me or e.mail:

mikeenkiproductions1@gmail.com

Let’s create something unforgettable.

items.text:
NCL Dancer Audition in LA
Dancer Auditions in LA on April 23rd for Norwegian Cruise Line

Open Call

Sign in at 9:30AM

Audition at 10:00AM

The Six Compound

4061 Laurel Canyon Blvd. 

Studio City, CA 91604

Please bring a hard copy of your resume and headshot. Be prepared to dance multiple styles. All dancers should bring flat dance shoes/jazz slip-ons as well as sneakers. Female identifying dancers should bring dance heels. 

Original Creative Team: Katy Tate, Nappytabs, Whitney Bezzant

Seeking dancers for two original mainstage productions onboard Norwegian Cruise Line’s newest vessel, the Norwegian LUNA. *ELTON: A Celebration of Elton John* is a concert/Vegas Residency-Style production centered around Elton John's musical legacy. The second production, *HIKO*, creates an exciting world by combining technology with unique circus acts and extraordinary dance and movement.

Visit bit.ly/4bFrg1Y for more info!

Non-union. 18 and up only please.

Onboard: $1,000/week ($4,350/month) 

No cruise staff duties. Single cabins.

items.text:
🚨 BIG NEWS ALERT! 🚨  
🌟 This is YOUR chance to be part of something extraordinary! 🌟  

I’ve officially joined an inspiring new project under the Forever Entertainment family, and let me tell you—it’s time for BIG change. In a world that’s losing its sense of connection, this American production is here to bring people together to create something meaningful.  

Though I’m new to Forever Entertainment, I’ve never been more convinced of a project’s potential. This is more than just entertainment; it’s a movement. We’re collaborating, creating, and giving people (maybe YOU) the chance to get their names in shining lights. It’s your time to step closer to the spotlight and be part of something much bigger.  

But guess what? Projects like this succeed with the power of US—of YOU. Together, we can make magic happen. Join this unique journey and help us crowdfund a production that the world truly needs right now. Let’s build something unforgettable.  

✨ Ready to leave your mark? Will you take the leap? Drop a 🔥 if you’re with me, and head to the link in bio NOW to get involved! Opportunities like this don’t wait. Let’s shine together.  

#ForeverEntertainment #CrowdfundDreams #LightsCameraAction #AmericanProduction #CollaborateAndCreate 
#BeTheChange 
#ShineTogether 
#FilmCommunity 
#SupportTheArts 
#YourNameInLights

items.text:
(PAID) CASTING CALL – CATWOMAN FANMADE SHORT FILM (CASTING INTERNATIONALLY TO FILM IN NYC)

An upcoming independent student short film casting for the lead role of Catwoman!! Using a special loan granted and sponsored by our film school.

Producer/Director: Maddi Egan (unfortunately our previous director has had to step away due to family commitments)

Role: Catwoman

Gender: Female

Age Range: 18–25

Ethnicity: Open to all backgrounds

Location: New York City, United States, exact location unknown. As we are casting internationally, flights and hotel accommodation will be covered. If visa coverage / sponsorship is needed, we can sort upon further discussion depending on customs/national law requirements etc

This is a paid role. Transport and catering will be fully covered for all selected talent. 

Pay will be $4,000 USD for 20 hours of filming over two days ($200 an hour), which will be written in a contract (which will also detail accommodations, flights, etc) approved by our professor and given to whoever is successful in the role

We are looking for a confident, expressive performer who can embody Catwoman’s agility, charm, and unpredictability. Prior acting experience is not essential.

If you believe you fit this description, please email Eganmaddi1@gmail.com with your CV, Headshot and Showreel. If you don’t have any of the required materials please feel free to just send an email! 

We would love to welcome student actresses as we are students ourselves. This is an amazing opportunity to work overseas and work with students from a major film school!

Copy of the film, IMDB credits and keeping the catwoman costume is included as additional benefits on top of the pay and other expenses covered. You will also be invited to any film festivals or award ceremonies should this film be completed and successful in winning any awards.

Filming dates will be July 3rd to July 5th, with a rest day in between.

Join us in bringing an iconic character to life in a bold and stylised short film.

Location: New York City, United States, exact location unknown. As we are casting internationally, flights and hotel accommodation will be covered. If visa coverage / sponsorship is needed, we can sort upon further discussion depending on customs/national law requirements etc

This is a paid role. Transport and catering will be fully covered for all selected talent. 

Pay will be $4,000 USD for 20 hours of filming over two days ($200 an hour), which will be written in a contract (which will also detail accommodations, flights, etc) approved by our professor and given to whoever is successful in the role

We are looking for a confident, expressive performer who can embody Catwoman’s agility, charm, and unpredictability. Prior acting experience is not essential.

If you believe you fit this description, please email Eganmaddi1@gmail.com with your CV, Headshot and Showreel. If you don’t have any of the required materials please feel free to just send an email! 

We would love to welcome student actresses as we are students ourselves. This is an amazing opportunity to work overseas and work with students from a major film school!

Copy of the film, IMDB credits and keeping the catwoman costume is included as additional benefits on top of the pay and other expenses covered. You will also be invited to any film festivals or award ceremonies should this film be completed and successful in winning any awards.

Filming dates will be July 3rd to July 5th, with a rest day in between.

Join us in bringing an iconic character to life in a bold and stylised short film.
items.title: (PAID) CASTING CALL – CATWOMAN FANMADE SHORT FILM (CASTING INTERNATIONALLY TO FILM IN NYC)

Casting for "The Suit I Buried Her In", a feature film by @the8tharchiveprod

🎭Looking for mains/supporting/feature roles. After the death of his girlfriend, a Chinese-Canadian college student must confront his family's cultural shame and thr painful journey of learning to accept himself before anyone else. Email your CV, portfolio, or self-tape at tsibhi.2026@gmail.com before APRIL 12TH.

Find us on instagram @the8tharchiveprod

items.text:
CASTING CALL! Did an AI Chatbot Negatively Impact Your Life?
I’m a producer working with Muse, a leading television production company currently developing a premium documentary film for a major network.

We’re seeking individuals (18+) based in the U.S. or Canada who are open to sharing their personal experiences with AI chatbots as part of the upcoming documentary. **Have AI chatbots had a negative impact on your life, relationships, mental health, or career?** Have you ever felt misled, overly validated, or even disconnected from reality through interactions with them? **Did you experience paranormal activity through a chatbot?**

If so, please get in touch to learn more! (for those who have applied already, you are still being considered, thanks!). Please reach out via email to **casting@muse.ca** with a brief description of your experience. 

Note: ***This casting call is NOT permitted to be shared on external sites without prior consent.***

CASTING CALL! Did an AI Chatbot Negatively Impact Your Life?
I’m a producer working with Muse, a leading television production company currently developing a premium documentary film for a major network.

We’re seeking individuals (18+) based in the U.S. or Canada who are open to sharing their personal experiences with AI chatbots as part of the upcoming documentary. **Have AI chatbots had a negative impact on your life, relationships, mental health, or career?** Have you ever felt misled, overly validated, or even disconnected from reality through interactions with them? **Did you experience paranormal activity through a chatbot?**

If so, please get in touch to learn more! (for those who have applied already, you are still being considered, thanks!). Please reach out via email to **casting@muse.ca** with a brief description of your experience. 

Note: ***This casting call is NOT permitted to be shared on external sites without prior consent.***
items.title: CASTING CALL! Did an AI Chatbot Negatively Impact Your Life?

items.text:
My name is Ese and I’m having my Magazine Launch for Pure Collectives Magazine on May 16th. And as part of the entertainment we are having a mini runway with some designs.

So I’m calling all models to apply so we can have a model cast.

This is the process;

1. Fill out this form and questionnaire: 
https://forms.gle/vAYLHJzF4xQiVZaW9

2. We prepare a shortlist and invite you for a physical casting 

3. You attend the casting and we have our selection.

If you’re interested or have any questions you can fill the form and/or DM me on Instagram @fj.omasanuwa

Thank you all

🔥⚡ VENDOR FLASH SALE — LIMITED TIME! ⚡🔥

🤠 The GA Country Summer Festival 2026 is calling ALL vendors — and for a limited time, you can lock in your booth for just $75.

📅 Sunday, May 10th, 2026  
📍 The Colonnade • Ringgold, GA  
🕛 Vendor Hours: 12PM–9PM  

That’s a full day to sell, connect, and maximize your visibility in a high-energy festival atmosphere built around music, community, and family fun.

🎤 Featuring a celebrity guest performance by Tae Lewis from The Voice

We are open to all vendor categories, including:  
✅ Food Vendors  
✅ Retail & Crafts  
✅ Products, Services & More  

💥 This is more than a vendor space — it’s an opportunity to put your business in front of a live crowd, gain new customers, and be part of something BIG.

⏰ Limited spots available — first come, first served. Once they’re gone, they’re gone.

👇 3 EASY WAYS TO REGISTER 👇  

📲 Call or Text: 770-755-3987  
👉 Ask for Karah or Chad VanHoose  

📱 Scan the QR Code on the flyer  

🔗 Register online:  
https://www.eventeny.com/events/ga-country-summer-festival-23734/

🎶 Good music. Great vibes. YOUR booth. Let’s make it happen.

#GACountrySummerFestival #VendorFlashSale #Ringgold #Georgia #CountryFestival #VendorOpportunity #SmallBusiness #FoodVendor #CraftVendor #PopUpShop #SupportLocal #XtremeDreamsFoundation

Smashed it last night in adult beginners! Quick session, all learned in an hour, drilling out the moves and working on our speed of movement in a faster, more commercial routine. Is it perfection? No! But for an hours hard graft they ROCKED IT! 🥰🙌 And the vibe was insane! 👌

items.text:
🎬 CASTING DO FILMU FABULARNEGO

Poszukujemy aktorów i aktorek do głównych ról w nowym, poruszającym dramacie wojennym.

📍 Terminy castingu (na żywo):

– Warszawa – 18 kwietnia

– Wrocław – 2 maja

– Gdańsk – 7 maja

🎭 Poszukiwane role:

DZIEWCZYNA (15–20 lat) – rola główna

Wrażliwa, inteligentna, naturalna. Rola wymagająca dużej autentyczności i głębi emocjonalnej.

MATKA (35–45 lat)

Ciepła, silna, oddana rodzinie. Postać pełna emocji i wewnętrznej siły.

OJCIEC (40–50 lat)

Spokojny, odpowiedzialny, obecność sceniczna, subtelna gra emocji.

MŁODSZA SIOSTRA (8–12 lat)

Naturalna, ekspresyjna, emocjonalna relacja z główną bohaterką.

🎥 Doświadczenie mile widziane, ale nie jest wymagane – najważniejsze są naturalność i autentyczność.

📩 Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać na:

**juliarokietek@gmail.com**

W wiadomości prosimy podać:

– imię i wiek

– miasto zamieszkania

– aktualne zdjęcia (portret + sylwetka)

– krótką informację o sobie / doświadczeniu

Wybrane osoby zaprosimy na casting stacjonarny.

Zapraszamy! 🎭

items.text:
**Mini serial  wojenny 1940 – Szukamy mężczyzn i kobiet ( Gliwice/Katowice )**

 

Szukamy skarbu Zakonu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!

 

Jesteśmy grupą pasjonatów składającą się z osób z różnym doświadczeniem filmowym i miejscem zamieszkania. Spotykamy się 1 2 razy w miesiącu na sesjach testowych i video w wybrane niedziele, ustalane 1 2 tygodnie wcześniej. Projekt realizujemy na terenie Gliwic.

** **

**Kolejne nasze spotkanie to 12.04.26 i 19.04.26 ( Niedziela )   godz. 10:30 - 15:00**

 

Nasza Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Grupa1940’’ **poszukuje chętną osobę do projektu niekomercyjnego mini serialu osadzonego głównie w 1940 roku. Najlepiej jakby takie osoby były  ** z Gliwic lub okolic, Zabrza czy Katowice najdalej.**

 

1 – Rycerz Zakonu Templariuszy wiek: 40 – 50 z zarostem, kwestie po francusku

2 – Ojciec głównej bohaterki ‘’Antoni’’ ( Polak ) wiek: 35 – 40, kilka odcinków

3 – Podoficer niemiecki Waffen SS ( Niemiec ) wiek: 25 – 40, bez zarostu

4 – Zastępczyni szefa Ahnenerbe ( Niemka ) wiek: 25 – 30, kilka odcinków

5 – Oficer francuski wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, 1 scena kwestie po francusku

6 – Wujek głównej bohaterki ‘’Leon’’( Polak ) wiek: 40 – 45, kilka odcinków.

7 – Niemiecki żołnierz wiek: 20 – 40 bez zarostu, 2 odcinki kwestie po niemiecku

8 – Niemiecki żandarm wiek: 25 – 40 bez zarostu, kwestie po niemiecku, 2 odcinki

** **

**Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

items.text:
Dzień dobry,

Chciałbym przedstawić Wam Wiktorię. 14-letnią wokalistkę z Ustronia, która 3 kwietnia 2026 roku zadebiutowała swoim pierwszym utworem wraz z teledyskiem.

Wiktoria to wrażliwa, ambitna i bardzo pracowita młoda artystka. Ukończyła z wyróżnieniem Państwową Szkołę Muzyczną I stopnia w klasie gitary i od lat konsekwentnie rozwija swoją pasję do muzyki.

Jeśli ktoś z Państwa poszukuje młodego głosu do projektu muzycznego, castingu, wydarzenia artystycznego lub innej formy współpracy, będzie nam bardzo miło, jeśli zechce zwrócić uwagę na Wiktorię.

Poniżej zostawiam link do jej debiutanckiego teledysku:
items.previewDescription: "Mała Księżniczka" to debiutancki singiel czternastoletniej Wiktorii Nogowczyk, którego premiera odbyła się 3 kwietnia 2026 roku.Teledysk do utworu był kręco...
items.title: Wiktoria Nogowczyk - Mała Księżniczka (Official Video)
